response.global_analysis: The audio is primarily background music for an event waiting screen. I identified and timed specific character name callouts (Korone, Mio, Okayu) and BGM vocal samples ('Ready?', 'Perfect'). The Reference JSON correctly identifies the lack of a full vocal song, so I am prioritizing these short vocalizations and the primary on-screen instructional text as per the decoding hierarchy.
